name: bitaxe-stabiliser
description: Web-based Bitaxe monitoring and control application. Choose a temperature and app will attempt to keep your bitaxe at that temperature by adjusting the asic frequency

scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:react && npm run postbuild
scripts.postbuild: cp static/Bitaxe.png public/ && cp static/favicon.ico public/
scripts.release: echo 'Usage: npm run release -- minor|major|patch' && exit 1
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && gh release create --generate-notes
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && gh release create --generate-notes
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push --follow-tags && gh release create --generate-notes
